summary: Phase F.2 Single Central Record (SCR) — backend + frontend both verified end-to-end. All 14 new SCR backend tests pass, all 18 prior HR regression tests pass (32/32 = 100%). Frontend manager flow validated: login → Children's workspace → /hr → Safer Recruitment page → 'Open Single Central Record' CTA → SCRDashboard renders fully with 5 KPI tiles (Compliant 0 / DBS Expiring 0 / Overdue Supervisions 2 / References Gap 4 / Expired Training 2), 8 staff rows with all 15 RAG-coloured columns (incl. DBS no./issue/expiry), filters bar, PDF export (5.3KB valid PDF, %PDF- header, filename single-central-record-2026-05-24.pdf), back navigation. Premium copy 'Live safer-recruitment evidence', 'Inspection-Ready', 'Generated 24 May, 20:49 · 8 of 8 staff shown' all present. RBAC verified at API level: staff/senior get 403 on both /api/hr/scr and /api/hr/scr.pdf; manager/admin get 200.
critical_code_review_comments: SCRDashboard.jsx is 331 lines — clean, single-purpose, well below the 700-line threshold. No code quality concerns.

scr-filter-clear button is conditionally rendered only when a filter is active (line 192 in SCRDashboard.jsx). This is intentional UX and matches the task spec — flagged here only so the next testing agent does not assume the testid is missing on first render.
PDF endpoint correctly streams application/pdf with Content-Disposition attachment + filename. ReportLab output is deterministic and audit-logged.
Frontend uses responseType:'blob' + URL.createObjectURL for download — standard, no leaks observed.

All 12 SCR-related data-testids are present on the rendered dashboard (scr-dashboard, scr-kpi-tiles, scr-filters, scr-table-section, scr-table, scr-non-compliant-only, scr-filter-role, scr-filter-emp, scr-filter-status, scr-filter-clear [conditional], scr-download-pdf-btn, scr-back-btn) and 8 scr-row-{staff_id} testids on rows.
Determinism test passes: two consecutive calls return identical summary/kpis/per-staff status.
Rows correctly sorted red → amber → green at API level.
test_credentials: manager@care.local / Manager@123, admin@care.local / Admin@123, staff@care.local / Staff@123, senior@care.local / Senior@123
seed_data_creation: None — used existing seed (8 staff: Priya Senior, Test Senior Reg, James Patel (Agency), Alex Staff, Lockout Tester x2, Admin, Sarah Manager)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend auth uses localStorage keys 'cc_token' + 'cc_user' (NOT 'token'/'authToken'). For Playwright API-based login, use page.context.request.post then evaluate localStorage.setItem('cc_token', t) / setItem('cc_user', JSON.stringify(u)) BEFORE navigating to /hr. The app routes through /welcome (sector picker) — must click 'Enter workspace' (Children's) first or the route guard kicks back to /login. SCR PDF download uses standard browser blob download — use page.expect_download() to capture. Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration43b_scr.py — run with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env var set from frontend/.env.
rca_of_the_issue: No issues found — Phase F.2 SCR ships clean. All acceptance criteria from review_request met.
